description: A seed of thought; a mental conception or unit of potential that can be developed into a more complex understanding or creation. It is the starting point of all intentional action.
rationale: The word 'nophe' frames an idea as a 'mind-seed'. The initial 'no-' grounds the concept in the mind and mindful wholeness (Buddhist). The final syllable '-phe' uses the abstract fricative 'ph' to represent the idea as a concentrated seed of potential, ready to be planted and grown (Solarpunk).
